name: Aqua Metals, Inc.
business: Aqua Metals is developing and commercializing proprietary recycling and refining technologies for the recovery of critical minerals and metals, primarily using its AquaRefining process for lithium-ion battery recycling. The company sells recycled high-purity metals and materials such as lithium, nickel, cobalt, copper, and manganese to the battery manufacturing supply chain and broader metals markets.

exposures.sentence: Batteries used in mobility applications, such as electric vehicles ("EVs"), are expected to remain the largest driver of battery demand and may represent approximately 85% of projected battery demand by 2035.
grid-scale battery energy storage systems ( BESS ) are expected to represent one of the fastest-growing segments of battery demand.
exploratory initiatives related to polymetallic nodules and other sources of critical minerals.
including emerging battery chemistries and alternative sources of critical minerals and rare earth materials.

catalysts.event: Completed multi-week continuous 24-hour operating campaign at pilot facility
catalysts.sentence: In late 2024, the Company completed a multi-week continuous 24-hour operating campaign at its pilot facility, demonstrating the ability to deliver exceptional recovery rates and produce battery-grade critical minerals.

catalysts.event: Entered non-binding term sheet to acquire Lion Energy, LLC
catalysts.sentence: On February 6, 2026, the Company entered into a non-binding term sheet with Lion Energy, LLC

tamClaims.claim: Global battery demand projected to grow from ~2 TWh in 2025 to ~4.2 TWh by 2030 and ~6.8 TWh by 2035
tamClaims.sentence: Global battery demand is projected to grow from approximately 2 terawatt-hours ("TWh") in 2025 to around 4.2 TWh by 2030, and potentially reaching about 6.8 TWh by 2035

tamClaims.claim: Global installed BESS capacity projected to grow ~50% annually through 2030, reaching 500-700 GWh
tamClaims.sentence: Global installed BESS capacity is projected to grow at an annual rate of approximately 50% through 2030 and could reach between 500 and 700 gigawatt-hours ( GWh ) by that time

tamClaims.claim: Global BESS market value estimated at $120-$150 billion by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: The global BESS market is expected to continue expanding rapidly, with projected market value estimates ranging from approximately $120 billion to $150 billion by 2030

tamClaims.claim: Energy storage installations reached ~37.1 GWh in 2024, projected to exceed 50 GWh in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: In 2024, energy storage installations reached approximately 37.1 GWh, and installations were projected to exceed 50 GWh in 2025.

tamClaims.claim: More than 100 additional battery manufacturing facilities may need to be constructed globally by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: industry forecasts suggest that more than one hundred additional battery manufacturing facilities may need to be constructed globally by 2030
